01

About

A PM who speaks both product and engineering with the data to back it up.

Senior PM with 10+ years building digital products at scale. From Argentina's #1 OTT streaming platform to B2B Fintech SaaS for North American SMEs. Based in Turin, EU citizen, open to opportunities across Spain and Europe.

What sets me apart: I don't just define the roadmap. I build the data infrastructure to validate it. Hands-on in SQL, Python, and AI automation (n8n, LangChain, OpenAI API), collaborating deeply with engineering and making every decision evidence-based.

I've owned strategy, discovery, backlog, delivery, and GTM end-to-end as a sole PM in fast-moving, cross-functional, international remote teams across Telco, Fintech, and Consulting.

ProblemNo clear roadmap ownership, unmanageable backlog, poor sprint velocity, zero data infrastructure to measure product health.
My roleSole PM and PO. Full strategy, backlog, and delivery. Rebuilt agile process, anchored to OKRs, built BI layer in BigQuery and Python.
Data workConsolidated fragmented data into real-time dashboards. Cohort analysis identified KYC drop-off points driving the 18% conversion improvement.

OTT Streaming · Consumer · Latam · Telco

Flow

Mar 2016 · Dec 2021
Telecom Argentina
Buenos Aires

1 / 3

Argentina's answer to the streaming wars. Transforming a traditional cable operator into a unified super-aggregator with Linear TV, VOD, and third-party apps under one experience.

5M+
Active users
at peak
3M+
Households
reached
35%
Time-to-content
reduction
100M+
VOD views
year one
ProblemTraditional cable losing to Netflix and HBO. High friction switching apps. Discovery broken across 150+ channels and 15,000+ disconnected VOD titles.
SolutionCross-platform super-aggregator (iOS, Android, Web, STB) with unified search, deep-linking to Netflix and YouTube, Reverse EPG, and Cloud DVR.
StrategyPrioritized mobile MVP to capture the second-screen trend, ensuring 99.9% streaming stability before full STB rollout.
Impact#1 entertainment platform in the region. Churn reduction via Flow Flex: 100% digital, no installation required.

IoT · Consumer Wearables · Telco · Argentina

Personal Bipy

2017 · 2019
Telecom Argentina
Buenos Aires

1 / 2

Argentina's first consumer IoT ecosystem. Three connected devices designed end-to-end: hardware spec, companion app, and 4G connectivity plan under one product family.

#1
First IoT smartwatch
in Argentina
3
Products in
one ecosystem
E2E
Hardware + App
+ Connectivity
ProblemNo consumer IoT offer from telcos. Families needed simple connected tools for kids, elderly, and pets. High emotional value, no local competitor.
EcosystemBipy Kids (smartwatch + video call + SOS), Bipy Elderly (health monitor + medication reminders), Bipy Pets (GPS collar + sensors). Single companion app.
My roleEnd-to-end: hardware specs, app UX, 4G integration, IoT connectivity plan, and GTM across tech, marketing, sales, and ops.
ImpactEstablished Personal as regional IoT reference. Opened the category for smart home and agri-IoT launches.
04

Consulting services

Fractional CPO

Senior product leadership, on demand

For B2B SaaS or Fintech companies that need a senior PM without the full-time overhead. Strategy, roadmap, cross-functional alignment and the data layer alongside it.

Discovery & GTM

From validated idea to market

Lean discovery sprints, user research, competitive analysis, and GTM planning. Build the right thing before committing to a full engineering cycle.

Data & BI

Build the evidence layer

BI infrastructure and KPI frameworks that actually get used. SQL, Python, BigQuery, Tableau, Amplitude. Real-time dashboards from day one.

AI Automation

Competitive advantage through AI

Custom AI agents and pipelines (n8n, Make, OpenAI API, LangChain) that remove bottlenecks and create defensible advantages. Practical AI, not demos.

05

How I work

01 / Discovery

Find the real problem

User interviews, data analysis, competitive mapping. A badly defined problem is the #1 cause of products nobody uses.

02 / Strategy

Decide what to build first

OKR-anchored roadmaps, impact/effort prioritisation, realistic horizons. No wishful thinking.

03 / Data

Build the evidence layer

BI and KPI frameworks before the first sprint ends. Every decision measurable from day one.

04 / Execution

Ship with the team

Work alongside engineering as a peer. Clear specs, tight acceptance criteria, short feedback loops.

05 / Iteration

Measure and improve

Every release is a hypothesis. Track metrics, run A/B experiments, feed learnings into the next cycle.
